data.name: Elleria - Book 1
data.detailed_description:
There's never been a more truer war fought than war of faith, for if people will not fight for what they believe in, what else is there to fight for?

You've seen it, and you've been there. Once a devoted man fighting for what he believed in, seen and believed a hero... for all the wrong reasons.

But if you've had a chance to do it again, would you do it the same?

Follow the story of Eliot Magnus (first name changeable), once a devoted man of faith and a Paladin of his god, deemed a hero. Yet a hero can be turned into a villain, for all the right reasons when he fought for all the wrong reasons before.


  "It was you. You started it all. You raised me, molded me in your image. And when I saw the       truth, you cast me aside—no, you did worse. You kept taking. My faith, my brothers, my  world. You created me, and for that— I bless you. You make sense of the devil."

"It is not the world that is flawed, but those who inhabit it. Your ambitions, your insatiable greed, your lust for power—these petty desires have poisoned your hearts. You are weak, lacking the strength of control, discipline, and a true will. For centuries, I have stood in silence as you defiled these lands with your selfish pursuits. But no longer. If this world must end in fire, then you will burn with it, for I am the law, the judge, and the executioner of this realm."

Elleria contains:

  • Over 1000 renders.

  • 50 sound effects.

  • Custom Soundtracks!

  • Character Codex System ( Unlockable via progression!)

  • Codex System, containing more in depth lore on the world, characters etc!

  • Gallery (Various bonus renders that can be unlocked via gameplay!)

  • Several adult scenes

  • "War Table" system, allowing YOU the player, to have and leave your mark on the world of Elleria, and impact the story!

  • Hours of writing and story for your enjoyment!

data.short_description: Elleria is an adult visual novel, with focus on story telling and choices. Elleria contains mature content, such as sex scenes, usage of alcohol and violence in fantasy world.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM

  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES
